DA'S MOT TO CONSOLIDATE FILED

/CAL:DISPO OR TO SET PRELIM HEARING/X:THE PEOPLE DISMISS THE CHARGES IN COUNTS 18, 19, 20 AND 21 AS TO DEFENDANT SUSAN KNUTSON PURSUANT TO PENAL CODESECTION 1385,/DEF:STIPULATE TO THE MONIES SEIZED UPON ARREST ARE TO BE FORFEITED/BE/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE IS GRANTED,/X:THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE THE PRELIMINARY HEARING AS DEFENSE COUNSEL, ALENXANDRIA CARL, JUST HAD A BABY/CONTD:DISPO OR TO SET PRELIM HRG/DOP/TE:1 DAY/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND PEOPLE'S MOTION TO CONTINUE/X:PEOPLE'S MOTIONTO CONTINUE IS GRANTED, DA IN TRIAL,/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE:1 DAY/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:CO-DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL, JOSEPH SULLIVAN, JUST HAD SURGERY, BUT NO MOTIONTO CONTINUE WAS FILED,/CONTD:TO SET PRELIM HEARING/TE:1 DAY/

/CAL: PHC AND DA TO FILE CONSOLIDATED COMPLAINT/X: CONSOLIDATED FIST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/987,2/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE:2 DAYS/

/CAL:TO SET PRELIM HEARING/X:ATTORNEY, ALEXADRIA CARL, WAS APPOINTED ON THIS CASE ON 05-04-10,/X:ON 09-21-10, THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE WITH CASES 2388483, 2403954, 2438357, 10002111, 10003186, AND 10003190, BUT NO CONSOLIDATED COMPLAINT WAS FILED,/CONTD:PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE AND DA TO FILE CONSOLIDATED COMPLAINT,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/987,2/CONTD:TO SET/DOP/TE:ONE TO THREE DAYS/X:2 ORDERS FOR APPOINTMENT OF COUNSEL AND EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR APPOINTMENT SIGNED AND FILEDIN OPEN COURT/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:DA'S ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE IS GRANTED,/CONTDPRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE:1 DAY/
/CAL: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: ONEDAY/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIM HEARING/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/TE:2 DAYS/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIM HRG/X:THE COURT, HAVING HEARD DEFENDANT'S MARSDEN MOTION, THE COURT DENIED SAID MOTION,/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIM HEARING/CONTD:TO SET PRELIM HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO CONTINUE DUE TOCO-DEFENDANTS MEDICAL CONDITIONS,/CONTD: TO RE-SET PRELIM HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/CONTD:TO SET/

/CONTD:FOR PRETRIAL IN DEPT 26/
